case_title: SMITH-EMERY COMPANY INC. VS L.V. MAWN CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT L.V. MAWN CORPORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,720.00 FILED BY SMITH-EMERY COMPANY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT L.V. MAWN CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH-EMERY COMPANY INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT L.V. MAWN CORPORATION $1,720.00 PRINCIPAL, $37.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,757.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT L.V. MAWN CORPORATION
